The neighbor atoms of atom index 44 (Oxygen) are:

- Atom index 17 (Carbon)
- Atom index 43 (Hydrogen)

Geomconf_index for this molecule: 1647

File organization suggestion:
I recommend creating a folder named "geomconf_1647" and moving all three files (.geomconf_1647.xyz.view.json, file_log.txt, and geomconf_1647.xyz) into this folder to keep the working directory organized.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 44, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
